17. Kota Chakra & It’s Applications - Meghna Khanchandani 101
(Kota chakra is a very beautiful technique to predict events based on the
transit of planets in specific nakshatras. The chakra of the constellations, the
nakshatras. It is like the chakrvyu of the nakshatras. The kot is a fort. The qilla,
which has to be protected anyhow. This is especially useful in medical astrology.)
